Tideglass Registry.public_order_role: Confirms ownership, shipping entries, marriage and inheritance supports, and high-value record verification.
Tideglass Registry.failure_cost: Ownership disputes multiply, tariffs lose legitimacy, and elite rumor becomes actionable violence.

Mimolot Academy.public_order_role: Controls high-status knowledge movement and legitimizes copied or restricted materials.
Mimolot Academy.failure_cost: Leaked diagrams, forged licenses, and panic about who really controls dangerous knowledge.

Tariff Lantern Court.public_order_role: Turns trade disagreement into procedure before it becomes armed reprisal.
Tariff Lantern Court.failure_cost: Private enforcement replaces adjudication and every corridor becomes more expensive.

Guildheart Hub.public_order_role: Keeps industrial bargaining legible enough to continue.
Guildheart Hub.failure_cost: Strikes harden, supply chains stagger, and contract violence rises.

Roadwardens Order.jurisdiction: Major roads, convoy safety, travel order
Roadwardens Order.public_order_role: Keeps movement credible enough for non-army trade and travel.
Roadwardens Order.failure_cost: The map gets smaller because only the reckless keep moving.

House Shelk Estate Offices.public_order_role: Converts household control into regional legitimacy.
House Shelk Estate Offices.failure_cost: Servant chains, estate logistics, and succession all become public instability.

Sheresh Dome Stewards.jurisdiction: Commune seals, heat discipline, dome integrity

Sanctum Sands Memorial Authority.jurisdiction: Panim memorial routes and sacred movement
Sanctum Sands Memorial Authority.public_order_role: Keeps mourning, memory, and caravan discipline aligned.

Ashforge Citadel Works.jurisdiction: Foundry, quarry, and militarized production spheres
Ashforge Citadel Works.public_order_role: Anchors heavy production and hard-power logistics.
Ashforge Citadel Works.failure_cost: Production shortfall, armed escort scarcity, and strategic vulnerability.
